tagline: Engineering scalable web & mobile platforms — from startups to government technology programs serving millions of users daily.
bio: I'm a software engineer with six years of practice shipping production interfaces for fintech, government, FMCG and education platforms across Indonesia.

Currently leading frontend work at Diamond Food Indonesia — modernising B2B commerce that processes billions of rupiah in daily transactions. Previously contributed to GovTech Edu at Telkom Indonesia, building tools used inside the Ministry of Education.
